candidate_definitions.text: Fast robust predicates for computational geometry in JavaScript

Fast robust predicates for computational geometry in JavaScript. Provides reliable 2D and 3D point orientation tests (`orient2d`, `orient3d`, `incircle`, `insphere`) that are not susceptible to floating point errors (without sacrificing performance). A modern port of [Jonathan R…
